---
title: "Raunit Budhiraja"
image: images/profile.png
toc: false
code-tools: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/raunit-budhiraja-980595203/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/raunitbudhiraja02
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:raunit.budhiraja@mail.dcu.ie
    - text: "CV (PDF)"
      href: cv/raunit_cv.pdf
      target: _blank
---

## Hi, I'm Raunit.

I'm a Business Analyst, Pursuing my Master's Degree at Dublin City University with a genuine interest in the space where data meets decision-making. I turn messy datasets into patterns, patterns into insights, and insights into things people can actually act on.

My work sits across data analysis, machine learning, and business strategy. Outside of lectures I build small projects; usually starting from a question I genuinely want to answer, then figuring out the tools from there.

---


## Skills

| Area | Tools |
|---|---|
| {{< fa brands python >}} Languages | Python, SQL, Markdown, HTML/CSS |
| {{< fa book >}} Libraries | Pandas, Plotly, Scikit-learn, NumPy |
| {{< fa code-branch >}} Workflow | Git, GitHub, Quarto, VS Code, Jupyter |
| {{< fa chart-bar >}} Analytics | EDA, Classification, Regression, Dashboards |
---

## Education

**BSc Business Analytics** — Dublin City University *(2022 – Present)*
**BCA, Bachelor's Degree Certificate - Amity University, India** *(2020-2023)*
**High School Leaving Certificate, Delhi Public School, India ** *(2020)*

---

## Certifications

- [x] General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) — Kubicle
- [x] Data Security: Keeping Your Information Safe — Kubicle
- [x] Data Security: Handling Data Securely — Kubicle
- [x] Data Ethics & Risk: Introduction to Data Ethics — Kubicle
- [x] Data Ethics & Risk: Applying Ethical Thinking — Kubicle

---

## Featured Projects

::: {.callout-note}
## What I build
I work on projects across **data analysis**, **machine learning**, **dashboards**, and **business strategy**. 
Head to the [Projects](projects/index.qmd) page to see them all with full code and write-ups.
:::
